overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a lush forest trail, entering a shallow swamp with dead trees, and emerging into an open meadow. The scene features vibrant summer colors with a distinctive teal sky and transitions from enclosed woodland to open wetland.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through a lush forest with wildflowers blooming on the hillsides

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence running alongside the left side of the path
large boulder formation on the hillside
winding dirt trail through the forest
dense tree canopy overhead creating dappled shadows
grassy hillsides covered with white and purple wildflowers

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail through a dense summer forest. A wooden fence lines the left side initially, while wildflowers cover the hillsides. The tree canopy creates partial shade over the path, and the scene is enclosed by lush vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy bank under large oak tree approaching wetland

events.description: character leaves the dirt path and turns right into the grassy area
character steps from grass into shallow swamp water

agents.ego_description: leaving the main trail to explore the grassy bank and approach the water's edge under a large oak tree

entered.detail: massive oak tree with spreading branches providing shade
shallow water with reflections visible in the distance
leafless dead trees standing in the water

segments.scene_description: The character veers off the dirt path into a grassy area beneath a massive oak tree. The lighting becomes more diffused under the tree canopy as the character approaches the edge of a shallow swamp. Dead trees become visible standing in the water ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow swamp with dead trees and reeds

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow swamp water among dead trees and tall reeds

entered.detail: tall reeds and rushes growing in the shallow water
mountain range visible on the horizon under the teal sky

segments.scene_description: The character wades through the shallow swamp water, surrounded by dead trees and reeds. The environment opens up to full sky visibility with distant mountains visible on the horizon. The water reflects the bright teal sky as the character moves through the wetland.

events.description: character exits the water onto a grassy bank

agents.ego_description: climbing out of the swamp and continuing across the open grassy meadow

entered.detail: open grassland with scattered bushes and wildflowers
dense green shrubs on the left side of the meadow

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the water onto a grassy meadow. The terrain is now dry grass with scattered bushes, while the swamp remains visible to the right. The open landscape extends toward distant mountains under the bright summer sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense summer forest that gradually opens into a wide, sunlit meadow. It begins along a narrow dirt trail lined with a wooden fence and wildflowers, moving through a lush canopy that creates patches of shade. As the character veers off the path, the lighting becomes more diffused beneath a massive oak tree before the terrain shifts into a shallow swamp filled with reeds and dead trees. The scene then expands to reveal a bright teal sky and distant mountains as the camera wades through reflective waters, finally emerging onto dry, grassy plains with scattered bushes under the open summer horizon.
